reasoning: The bear case carries higher confidence (0.85 vs 0.78) with structurally compelling arguments: Fear & Greed at -0.44 and DXY strength create genuine headwinds that outweigh the crowded-shorts narrative, and TrendFollowV1 remaining paused confirms no bullish momentum confirmation.
